FrameConfig.title: FrameConfig
FrameConfig.description: Configuration object describing a custom 3D shadowbox/diorama gift frame.

id.description: The unique ID for the frame config

backgroundColor.description: HEX color string for backgrid decoration background

ledColor.description: HEX color string for fairy lights LED illumination

photoBase64.description: Base64 data url string of the uploaded photo

photoAspect.description: Aspect ratio of the photo display

whatsappPhone.description: Optional WhatsApp receiver notification cell contact phone

frames/{frameId}.description: Root collection of saved custom gift shadowbox frames configurations
